content.claim: A single documented case (Erdőkürt village school) shows uneven local social capital and bonding/bridging networks determined school survival, suggesting community-reliant non-structural strategies would produce uneven outcomes rather than uniform solutions across villages.
content.context: Fresh live research through the Portuguese system reform lens
limitations: Single case study; cannot be generalized as a scalable model
Does not measure social capital levels across multiple villages to test whether variation predicts retention
No counterfactual comparison to villages with higher social capital
content.population: Population described in the cited finding
content.time_scope: As reported by the cited source
